case_title: JOHNSON, SUSIE VS MARRA BROS. DIST. INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,213.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, SUSIE AS TO DEFENDANT MARRA BROS. DIST. INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED.
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO DEFT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, SUSIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARRA BROS. DIST. INC. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH (1) THAT THE OBJECT THAT CAUSED HER INJURIES WAS NOT A NATURALLY OCCURRING SUBSTANCE IN THE PRODUCT, OR (2) LIABILITY UNDER THEORIES OF PRODUCT LIABILITY OR BREACH OF WARRANTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT & ANSWER FILED BY PLTF. COPY OF SAME WITH "ANSWER" AND ATTACHMENTS MAILED TO DEFT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2007 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER SC-108A: ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "DENIED".
COPY OF SC-108A: ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGEMENT MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
